title: Neon Wilderland Side Quests
note: Adult dark pulp side pins for Lost Brothers. Atlas % pins offset from main chapter pins. Bands 1–4 ≈ campaign quarters; unlock by furthest chapter (see side-quests.ts).

quests.title: Biolume Tithe
quests.blurb: Pines pulse neon and demand a cut of blood or chrome before the trail opens.
quests.rewardHint: Biolume sap vial that hums near spoken names.

quests.title: Chrome Knife Cache
quests.blurb: Scavengers buried chrome blades under a fiber-vine oak. Dig or bleed.
quests.rewardHint: Chrome paring knife that never dulls on bark.

quests.title: Wake-Glade Whisper
quests.blurb: A spirit in the wipe-glade offers one syllable of a true name — for a price.
quests.rewardHint: Callsign scar that itches near Helix drones.

quests.title: Stim Patch Peddlers
quests.blurb: Road kids sell forget-patches. One dose and the dog growls at your face.
quests.rewardHint: Half-spent stim strip — useful, addictive, dirty.

quests.title: Widowmere Mirror
quests.blurb: Still water shows faces you do not remember owning. Something climbs out with them.
quests.rewardHint: Reflective coolant shard that fogs near lies.

quests.title: Barcode Saplings
quests.blurb: Young pines grow with SKU scars already cut into bark. Someone is planting property.
quests.rewardHint: Bark peel stamped with a dead product code.

quests.title: Pack Dog's Dig
quests.blurb: The Rememberer digs up a chrome jawbone. The rest of the body wants it back.
quests.rewardHint: Chrome canine tooth on a wire cord.

quests.title: Neon Dryad Bargain
quests.blurb: A spirit in fiber-optic hair offers a safe ford for three drops of brother-blood.
quests.rewardHint: Spirit-favor token — one trail lie forgiven.

quests.title: Coffle Shade Detour
quests.blurb: Night mist shapes old coffle cages. Walking through means fighting a memory with teeth.
quests.rewardHint: Cold iron flake that cools rage for an hour.

quests.title: Fiber-Vine Snare
quests.blurb: Living cable lashes travelers for Helix scrap. Cut free or become inventory.
quests.rewardHint: Fiber-vine coil — rope or garrote.

quests.title: Warrant Nail Auction
quests.blurb: Hunters auction warrant-nails wired into data-spikes. Your blank face is tonight's lot.
quests.rewardHint: Bent warrant nail — spoofs a low-tier scan once.

quests.title: SKU Hunter Duel
quests.blurb: Two bounty crews argue over who owns men with no names. They decide with fists.
quests.rewardHint: Hunter badge melted into scrap chrome.

quests.title: Palefen Coolant Sip
quests.blurb: Drink the reservoir and taste someone else's code. Refuse and the thirsty dead notice.
quests.rewardHint: Coolant flask that steadies stim shakes.

quests.title: Thornspine Ambush
quests.blurb: Ridgeline hunters still argue over blank-faced men — with crossbows and plasma tips.
quests.rewardHint: Plasma tip bolt, one shot left.

quests.title: Stim Den Confession
quests.blurb: A dust den priest takes confession for ampules. He knows Project Pale slang.
quests.rewardHint: Ampule labeled PALE-LITE — illegal as hell.

quests.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut
quests.blurb: A barge skipper needs mute muscle to move spirit-caged freight past freehold eyes.
quests.rewardHint: Chemical coin + sealed empty spirit jar.

quests.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets
quests.blurb: Leaflets promise a dragon that burns SKUs off skin. The cult wants initiates bloody.
quests.rewardHint: Pamphlet ink that glows under Helix neon.

quests.title: Crashed Scout Drone
quests.blurb: A Helix eye fell in the pines. Salvage the lens before the recall pack arrives.
quests.rewardHint: Cracked drone lens — shows heat ghosts at night.

quests.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed
quests.blurb: Reedfen pits run warm-up bloodsport for stim and bragging rights.
quests.rewardHint: Knuckle wrap stained with other men's odds.

quests.title: Rememberer's Trail
quests.blurb: The dog tracks a scent that is your own — from a life you do not own yet.
quests.rewardHint: Matted fur sample dogs treat as pack.

quests.title: Gate Smile Tax
quests.blurb: Border neon smiles for coin. Refuse and the drones smile with guns.
quests.rewardHint: Counterfeit smile-chip — buys one soft checkpoint.

quests.title: Blacksite Soft Entry
quests.blurb: A Helix blacksite leaks stim waste into the mire. Soft entry means hard exit.
quests.rewardHint: Half-burned blacksite keycard, still warm.

quests.title: Neural Collar Yard
quests.blurb: Yard of rings and meters. Someone left a collar unlocked — bait or mercy.
quests.rewardHint: Dead collar ring — bluffs seal-guards once.

quests.title: Guest Suite Mirror
quests.blurb: Luxury glass shows your wetwork face before the wipe. Smash it or learn it.
quests.rewardHint: Mirror shard that clouds when you lie to brothers.

quests.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid
quests.blurb: Smokestack stumps hide Helix leftovers. Scavs and spirits both claim the fog.
quests.rewardHint: Green fog ampule — blinds cameras for a minute.

quests.title: Director's Leftover Memo
quests.blurb: A discarded slate names Project Pale cells. Reading it tags you for a hunter ping.
quests.rewardHint: Memo fragment with three callsigns that might be yours.

quests.title: Spirit Meter Calibration
quests.blurb: Helix techs force woods spirits through meters. Sabotage or sell them out.
quests.rewardHint: Spirit-meter dial that reads debt in air.

quests.title: Reedfen Body Drop
quests.blurb: Marsh corpses wear your old unit tattoos. Something wants the dog next.
quests.rewardHint: Unit tattoo scrap in a waterproof sleeve.

quests.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl
quests.blurb: Kitchen staff fight with cleavers over who services the numbered beds.
quests.rewardHint: Bloodied cleaver that cooks and kills.

quests.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage
quests.blurb: Mountain notch wired for drones. Cut the uplink and the gate smile dies.
quests.rewardHint: Uplink fuse — fries one drone swarm if thrown right.

quests.title: Undervault Open Mic
quests.blurb: Synth-mandolin keeps time with bone. A comedian sells true names as jokes.
quests.rewardHint: Mandolin string that hums fight tempo into your pulse.

quests.title: Bone Mandolin Bout
quests.blurb: Three-round pit booking. Betting odds treat brothers as one body.
quests.rewardHint: Pit purse + a broken tooth souvenir.

quests.title: Project Pale Echo
quests.blurb: A booth plays your old wetwork briefing. Listening may finish the wipe — or undo it.
quests.rewardHint: Briefing chip only the dog hears cleanly.

quests.title: Spirefall Loot Run
quests.blurb: Towers burn. Scavs race for chrome before righteous fire eats warehouses.
quests.rewardHint: Half-melted Helix crate of stims and wire.

quests.title: Dragon Weather Prayer
quests.blurb: Cultists kneel under ash rain, begging a chrome dragon to unmake barcodes.
quests.rewardHint: Ash-prayer bead that warms before dragon weather.

quests.title: Identity Burn Party
quests.blurb: Freeholds burn SKU papers. Someone brought live Helix meat to the bonfire.
quests.rewardHint: Burnt paper ash that smells like your first callsign.

quests.title: Freehold Betrayal Bid
quests.blurb: Westwind holders auction a Dominion defector who claims he helped wipe you.
quests.rewardHint: Defector ring — opens one Helix soft lock.

quests.title: Ash Horizon Duel
quests.blurb: A rival cell with your old faces wants a clean kill before the road west.
quests.rewardHint: Rival callsign plate, scratched out mid-fight.

quests.title: Vale's Private Pit
quests.blurb: Director Vale keeps private bloodsport under the Spire. Invite-only — crash it.
quests.rewardHint: Private pit token stamped with Vale's seal.

quests.title: Three Names Returned
quests.blurb: A spirit offers three true names on a slate. Saying them may summon hunters — or brothers.
quests.rewardHint: Slate fragment with three names under frost.

quests.title: Chrome Dragon Rumor
quests.blurb: Scavs swear a dragon of welded chrome nests in coolant fog. Rumor pays if you prove it.
quests.rewardHint: Welded chrome scale that ticks like a Geiger.

quests.title: Last Stim Before Dawn
quests.blurb: One last den on the ash road. Dream the wipe — or smash the den for sober coin.
quests.rewardHint: Final ampule — clarity or relapse, your call.
